title: Starlight
description: A Space Red & Yellow themed 1.8.9 PvP pack
body:
Starlight is a 1.8.9 texture pack that's themed arround the space theme !


It uses Red & Yellow Colors throughout the pack as it's based out of a project i never finished based on the swords of the packs !


It includes also includes a custom sky fully made for the pack (that only works with Optifine !) 


Here are some screenshots to showcase the pack :)


![Starlight #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28f09be2845078fb8cda14d60866526fcc7c68ed.jpeg)

![Starlight #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0df8db185deb4ce2c15ee8d28ad93d91aaee9760.jpeg)

![Starlight #3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/256011e353218c8ae1913dd8c462937f38d1fa42.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
